summary: Frontend-only mobile (375x812) E2E test of Kaftan Queens after the palazzo/Butterfly photo refresh. Verified mobile layout, mobile nav drawer, enlarged logo with normal header height, PDP variant swatch image swap, lightbox open, add-to-bag flow with cart drawer auto-open, valid Shopify checkout URL handoff, and an exhaustive CTA audit across all 9 product handles and every colour variant. All target flows pass. One legitimate but undocumented 'Email to Order' CTA was discovered on the Narlai Dress (light-cotton-dress) → Pink/Orange Teardrop variant — it is marked pending:true AND prepend:true in localAdditions.js, which means the DEFAULT landing CTA for that PDP is 'Email to Order' (not 'Add to Bag'). Confirming with main agent whether this is intentional.

issues: Radix console warnings persist from iter-1: 'DialogContent requires a DialogTitle' on the mobile nav Sheet (Navbar.jsx) and 'Missing Description or aria-describedby={undefined}' on cart drawer/sheet. Wrap titles in VisuallyHidden or add SheetTitle/SheetDescription. Non-blocking.
React DOM warning: Invalid prop 'fetchpriority' (should be 'fetchPriority' camelCase). Trace it from an with fetchpriority attr (likely Lightbox or a CDN image component).

unexpected_email_to_order.reason: Configured in /app/frontend/src/data/localAdditions.js LOCAL_VARIANT_ADDITIONS['light-cotton-dress'] with pending:true AND prepend:true — this variant is prepended to position 0, so the DEFAULT activeVariant on PDP landing is this pending one and the CTA renders as 'Email to Order' even though the other 3 Narlai Dress variants (Pink White, Blue Flower → Add to Bag, White Ditsy → Sold Out) are perfectly orderable.

add_to_bag_per_product.palazzo-trousers: Teal Blue & White Flower / Pink & Blue Flower / Orange, Yellow & Gold Fleck → Add to Bag
add_to_bag_per_product.light-cotton-dress: Pink White, Blue Flower → Add to Bag; White Ditsy → Sold Out; Pink/Orange Teardrop → Email to Order

pdp_palm_kaftan_add_to_bag.checkout_final_url: https://kaftan-queens-3.myshopify.com/password (store is in password-protected 'Opening soon' mode — Shopify-side config, NOT a bug)

action_items: DECISION NEEDED: Narlai Dress (light-cotton-dress) → 'Pink/Orange Teardrop' variant is configured as pending:true & prepend:true in localAdditions.js (lines 58-69). Because of prepend:true, this variant becomes activeVariant[0] on landing, so the default PDP CTA is 'Email to Order'. The problem statement says ONLY Butterfly Long Dress + Pink Tiedye Palazzo should show Email-to-Order. Either (a) un-mark this variant pending if stock is now available, or (b) remove prepend:true so a stockable variant is the default and Pink/Orange Teardrop is just one selectable option. Recommend (b) at minimum so the landing CTA on Narlai Dress is 'Add to Bag'.

Fix Radix a11y: add SheetTitle (or VisuallyHidden wrapper) to the Navbar mobile menu SheetContent (Navbar.jsx line 30) — currently throws 'DialogContent requires a DialogTitle' console error every time the drawer opens.
Fix React DOM warning: → use camelCase fetchPriority. Likely in Lightbox.jsx or wherever images are rendered with that attribute.
(Carry over from iter-1, still unfixed) Update /app/frontend/public/index.html <title> from 'Emergent | Fullstack App' to a Kaftan Queens brand title.
critical_code_review_comments: ProductDetail.jsx line 26: setColour(variants[0]?.colour) blindly selects index 0 — if a pending variant is prepended, it becomes the default and the user lands on an Email-to-Order CTA. Consider: setColour(variants.find(v => !v.pending && !v.soldOut)?.colour || variants[0]?.colour).
CartDrawer checkout anchor (line 71-78): if (!checkoutUrl) prevents default silently. Add a toast (matching Cart.jsx behavior) so user knows cart is still loading. UX consistency.
Navbar.jsx mobile SheetContent (line 30) is missing SheetTitle — produces Radix a11y error every drawer open. Wrap a title in VisuallyHidden.
localAdditions.js light-cotton-dress 'Pink/Orange Teardrop' has both pending:true and prepend:true — likely needs review now that photos/inventory are refreshed.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on every requested flow (mobile render, nav drawer, logo, swatch+lightbox, add-to-bag, Shopify checkout URL). 1 borderline finding flagged for product/inventory clarification.

test_credentials: Not required — public storefront, no auth.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile flows fully validated at 375x812. Shopify checkout URL pattern returned: https://kaftan-queens-3.myshopify.com/cart/c/<id>?key=...&_s=...&_y=...  — currently the store front-end is in 'Opening soon' password mode (final URL is /password), but the cart→checkout handoff itself is correct. All 9 product handles enumerate cleanly. Only 3 variants legitimately render Email-to-Order: butterfly-long-dress (all 4), palazzo-trousers Pink Tiedye, light-cotton-dress Pink/Orange Teardrop — last one is the 'unexpected' finding per the problem statement.
rca of the issue: Narlai Dress default landing CTA is Email-to-Order because LOCAL_VARIANT_ADDITIONS['light-cotton-dress'] has prepend:true, which causes the pending Pink/Orange Teardrop variant to be inserted at index 0, and ProductDetail.jsx line 26 always initializes colour to variants[0].colour. Mitigation: either remove prepend:true, or change the init logic in ProductDetail.jsx to prefer the first NON-pending/NON-soldOut variant.
